name: ai-context 配置索引流程
summary: ai-context 自身的配置、安装、任务 Gate 和索引生成流程。
purpose: 让 AI 先读 JSON 索引，再按需加载项目、场景、规则和 skill 原文。

source.whenToRead: Read when installing or modifying ai-context itself.

whyThisComposition: This scene groups 1 project(s) because they commonly participate in: ai-context 自身的配置、安装、任务 Gate 和索引生成流程。. Load individual project JSON first, then source markdown only for detailed execution rules.

projects.name: ai-context
projects.reason: ai-context is part of ai-context 自身的配置、安装、任务 Gate 和索引生成流程。.

operationGuide.environmentSwitching: No business environment switch. Use scripts/install-ai-context.mjs check/validate/install.
operationGuide.startup: Open config JSON or docs/prototypes/context-studio.html for the product prototype.
notes: Future real app code should live under src/.

readPolicy.notes: Do not load every project in the scene. Select projects based on the user request first.
